3053380.name: Fables Mosaic: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
3053380.description:
Fable Mosaics: Snow White is the fourth installment of old fables!. It features a collection of colored puzzles solved by logic, while following the Snow White Story. Are you ready to solve the puzzles as the story develops? Immerse yourself in this captivating nonogram mosaic game playing over 100 levels plus unique puzzle bonuses!


Key Game Features

120 unique levels
Enoy Snow White story!
Gallery of completed levels
Logic solving puzzles
Customizable tiles!
Unique logic bonus puzzles!
3053380.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
